mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.payment_date AS paymentDate, p.payment_price AS paymentPrice, p.payment_fee AS paymentFee, p.method, p.status, p.payment_type AS paymentType, p.canceled_at AS canceledAt, p.reason, COALESCE(u.nickname, '(탈퇴)') AS trainerNickname FROM PAYMENT p LEFT JOIN TRAINER t ON p.trainer_id = t.id LEFT JOIN USER u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.id DESC

SELECT mp.id, mp.lesson_count AS lessonCount, mp.start_date AS startDate, mp.end_date AS endDate, mp.status, mp.next_session AS nextSession, mp.trainer_id AS trainerId, ms.type AS membershipType, ms.type_rep AS typeRep, ms.price, COALESCE(u.nickname, '(탈퇴)') AS trainerNickname FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT mp LEFT JOIN MEMBERSHIP ms ON mp.membership_id = ms.id LEFT JOIN TRAINER t ON mp.trainer_id = t.id LEFT JOIN USER u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE mp.member_id = #{memberId} AND mp.status = 'active' ORDER BY mp.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT f.id, f.feedback_date AS feedbackDate, f.summary, f.comment, f.next_comment AS nextComment, COALESCE(u.nickname, '트레이너') AS trainerNickname, u.profile_image AS trainerImg FROM FEEDBACK f LEFT JOIN TRAINER t ON f.trainer_id = t.id LEFT JOIN USER u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE f.workout_id IN ( SELECT id FROM WORKOUT_LOG WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ) ORDER BY f.feedback_date DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS owunDate FROM POST WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_type = 'exerciseComplete' AND status = 'normal' GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY owunDate DESC
